name: seldonframe
description: Build, deploy, and sell AI agents for local-service businesses — from your IDE. One command creates a live hosted workspace: website, booking page, intake form, CRM, and an AI receptionist, in about 3 minutes.
long_description: SeldonFrame is an open-source GoHighLevel alternative for agencies and builders. 146+ MCP tools let Claude spin up a real, hosted business workspace — website, Cal.diy booking, Formbricks intake, CRM, and pre-wired AI agent archetypes (speed-to-lead, missed-call-text-back, review-requester) — in minutes, on a live `<slug>.app.seldonframe.com` subdomain. No guest mode, no local files, no upfront API key: the first workspace is free forever. An API key is only needed later to unlock a second workspace, custom domains, full Brain v2, or publishing to the agent marketplace. This connector is MIT-licensed; the SeldonFrame platform is AGPL-3.0.

api_key.title: SeldonFrame API Key
api_key.description: Optional. First workspace is free without a key. Unlocks more workspaces, custom domains, and marketplace selling.

api_url.title: SeldonFrame API URL
api_url.description: Optional. Override the SeldonFrame API base URL. Defaults to https://app.seldonframe.com. Set for self-hosted deployments.
